official_sources.evidence: Current mapped private fee endpoint is the futures commissionRate source; a stable Spot account-effective fee-rate endpoint is not promoted in this adapter.

runtime_boundary: Spot fee rates must come from an explicit config/VIP schedule source until a stable Toobit Spot account fee endpoint is verified and parser-tested.
remaining_work: verify whether Spot exposes account-effective maker/taker fee readback
define config refresh and symbol applicability policy
promote shared FeeRateSnapshot only after source and parser are tested
